examples: Orville and Wilbur Wright made an aeroplane.
As a result: Orville Redenbacher became very rich.
On 17 December 1903, Orville Wright climbed into the aeroplane.
And indeed, Orville flies, thanks to plastic propellers and a remote-control engine stuffed inside his belly.
Corbis owns some of the most indelible images ever captured: Wilbur watching Orville's first takeoff.
